title: DexThemes for Codex — Build Week Product Demo
editorialGoal: Explain the product, prove the plugin happy path, and surface concise evidence for technical implementation, design and UX, potential impact, and idea quality.

narration.direction: Bright, confident, and conversational. Product-literate without sounding like an advertisement; brisk phrasing with room for the interface to read.

music.title: Close Up
music.mixDirection: Speech first; keep the rhythmic bed roughly 12 dB below narration and fade cleanly at both ends.

scenes.overlay: Turn any idea into a complete Codex theme.
scenes.support: DexThemes is a theme studio and community, now inside the conversation.
scenes.voiceover: Turn any idea into a complete Codex theme. This Build Week plugin brings DexThemes' studio and community directly into the conversation. I asked for a theme inspired by Argentina football at night and named it Argentina Afterglow.

scenes.overlay: Preview it. Copy it. Install it.
scenes.support: Choose a variant, copy its import, then paste it into Codex Appearance.
scenes.proof: Choose variant · Copy import · Open Appearance · Paste + Import
scenes.voiceover: DexThemes previews the full workspace, not just swatches. Choose a variant, copy its import, and open Codex Appearance. Paste, import, done. The theme is yours. No account required.

scenes.overlay: Search, compare, and follow what is winning.
scenes.support: Official Codex, DexThemes, and community themes share one conversational catalog.
scenes.proof: Today · this week · this month · all time
scenes.voiceover: The catalog is conversational. Search official Codex themes, DexThemes releases, and community submissions. Compare full previews and see daily, weekly, monthly, and historical leaders.

scenes.overlay: Sign in only when identity adds value.
scenes.support: GitHub OAuth is deferred until the user chooses a community action.
scenes.proof: Review both variants · explicit Publish · creator credit
scenes.voiceover: GitHub sign-in appears only when I publish. I review the name and both variants, approve the public action, and keep verified creator credit.

scenes.support: Themes, rankings, daily and weekly wins, and the achievement collection.
scenes.proof: Stats grow · achievements unlock with each milestone
scenes.voiceover: Creators track themes, rankings, daily and weekly wins, and achievements in one dashboard, where stats grow and new achievements unlock with each milestone.

scenes.overlay: Turn feedback into an open-source contribution.
scenes.support: Draft a structured GitHub issue without leaving the conversation.
scenes.voiceover: Because DexThemes is open source, users can turn product feedback into a ready-to-review GitHub issue from the same conversation.

scenes.overlay: Creative where it should be. Deterministic where it must be.
scenes.support: GPT-5.6 interprets intent; the MCP server validates; the visual app keeps decisions in context.
scenes.judgeSignal: Technical implementation · Thoughtful GPT-5.6 and Codex use
scenes.voiceover: GPT-5.6 interprets the creative intent. The MCP server validates names, colors, identity, and public actions. The visual app keeps every preview and decision in context.

scenes.proof: Open source · built for the Codex community
scenes.voiceover: Personal themes, community discovery, and creator recognition, all in one Codex conversation. DexThemes is open source and built for the community.
